who: small law firm administrators processing 5–15 invoices/month
offer: For small law firm administrators processing 5–15 invoices/month, manual billing causes cash flow gaps. We automate billing summaries instead of manual billing and spreadsheet tracking.
problem: Manual billing processes lead to errors and delays.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for law firm admins
Indie Hackers discussions on billing workflows
DM outreach to law firm admins with demo video
Forums where law firm admins share tools
try_it: Let users try monthly summary reports and error-checking for 1-3 invoices
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
